name: Esfandeyar Qureshi
about: I BUILT. OBSESSED. RELENTLESS. CHASING TASKS THAT IGNITED MY CURIOSITY, UNTIL PASSION OUTRAN REASON.

name: Hurman Ejaz
about: I build things that move. The cursor. The screen. The person watching. Motion isn't decoration — it's the message.

name: Hamiz Safdar
about: I don't manage companies. I build them. Vision without execution is noise — I turn the signal into structure.

name: Mounim Ijaz
about: I engineer perception. The narrative. The market. The human mind. Attention isn't asked for — it's commanded.

name: Taha Moazzam
about: Moving Machine Learning from local instances to global impact.
